x-enumeration-literals.name: First
x-enumeration-literals.description: First collection of a series of direct debit instructions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring
x-enumeration-literals.description: Direct debit instruction where the debtor's authorisation is used for regular direct debit transactions initiated by the creditor.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Final
x-enumeration-literals.description: Final collection of a series of direct debit instructions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OneOff
x-enumeration-literals.description: Direct debit instruction where the debtor's authorisation is used to initiate one single direct debit transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Represented
x-enumeration-literals.description: Collection used to re-present previously reversed or returned direct debit transactions.
